_comment: Baseline metric thresholds for model performance regression tests. Update these values when models are retrained and validated.

stuff_plus.description: Stuff+ gradient boosting: R² on temporal hold-out, RMSE on negative wOBA scale. Threshold is lenient because the test DB may use small synthetic data.

mechanix_ae.description: MechanixAE VAE: reconstruction loss after training, MDI range

pitchgpt.description: PitchGPT transformer: mean PPS (neg log-lik), perplexity upper bound

chemnet.description: ChemNet GNN: validation MSE, mean synergy on random inputs. Range is wide because synergy values depend on model weights and random input distribution.

causal_war.description: CausalWAR DML: expected WAR value ranges
